title: Fixing IndexError list index out of range in Synthesizer.generate_goldens_from_docs()
body: This PR aims to fix an IndexError (list index out of range) occurring in Synthesizer.generate_goldens_from_docs(), as referenced in https://github.com/confident-ai/deepeval/issues/1682. The goal is to introduce defensive checks and/or adjust the flow so that generate_goldens_from_docs does not raise on edge cases (e.g., empty/docs with missing fields) and that the Golden generation path integrates cleanly with the existing evaluation workflow. The exploration above confirms whether the Synthesizer and its generate_goldens_from_docs function exist in the current codebase and where they would be wired into the evaluation pipeline. From the current snapshot, there is no Synthesizer class or generate_goldens_from_docs function in the base_project, so the PR would either add a new module for Synthesizer or modify the integration point where goldens are produced and consumed by the evaluation flow.

step_plan.summary: Introduce a new Synthesizer module with a robust generate_goldens_from_docs to safely produce goldens for the evaluation pipeline and prevent IndexError on edge cases.

steps.operation: Add Synthesizer class with generate_goldens_from_docs method in deepeval/synthesizer.py
steps.reason: Introduce a dedicated module to produce goldens from documentation with defensive checks to prevent IndexError on edge cases (empty docs, missing fields, uneven lists) and return a safe, well-formed structure compatible with the evaluation workflow.
steps.side_effects: Adds a new module and entry point for golden generation; may require package imports/__init__ wiring; necessitates unit tests for edge cases; downstream evaluation code may need to import and use Synthesizer (adjustments to wiring or entry points if needed)
